tier_1.title: Faerzress Zone
tier_1.description: The air shimmers with wild magic. Compasses spin. Light sources flicker.
tier_1.success: You navigate by fungi patterns. Slow but steady.
tier_1.failure: Walked in circles. Half a day lost in the tunnels.

tier_1.title: Cave Fisher
tier_1.description: A sticky filament drops from the ceiling. Something chitinous shifts above.
tier_1.success: You spot the filament and burn it. The fisher retreats.
tier_1.failure: It snags a pack and reels it up. Fight for your supplies.

tier_1.title: Fungi Garden
tier_1.description: Bioluminescent mushrooms carpet the cavern floor in soft blue light.
tier_1.success: Edible varieties. A rare treat in the dark.
tier_1.failure: Poisonous lookalikes. Better not risk it.

tier_2.title: Drow Patrol
tier_2.description: Hand-crossbows click in the dark. Crimson eyes gleam from a side tunnel.
tier_2.success: You douse your lights and let them pass.
tier_2.failure: Poisoned bolts fly from the shadows.

tier_2.title: Underground River
tier_2.description: A rushing river blocks the path. The current looks lethal.
tier_2.success: You find stepping stones hidden beneath the surface.
tier_2.failure: A long detour through twisting tunnels. A full day wasted.

tier_3.title: Purple Worm Tunnel
tier_3.description: The tunnel walls are smooth and circular. Fresh. Something massive came through here recently.
tier_3.success: You hear it grinding through rock below and move fast.
tier_3.failure: The ground trembles. It surfaces behind you. Run!
